questionHtml:
Which feature(s) allow(s) transport of glucose in blood plasma?

I. It is hydrophobic.

II. It is polar.

III. Its solubility is low at 37 °C.

A. I only

B. II only

C. I and II only

D. II and III only

meta.title: Which feature(s) allow(s) transport of glucose in blood plasma? I. It is hydrophobic. II. It is polar. III. Its solubility is low at 37 °C. A. I only B. II only C. I and II only D.
